response.justification: Exceptional technical fit—comprehensive full-stack, TypeScript, React, AWS, and Kubernetes expertise with AI/LLM integration experience exceeds all requirements. However, overqualification for a junior/mid-level role creates sustainability concerns, and location ambiguity (Berlin address with current Kenya employment) conflicts with high on-site presence requirement.
strengths: Expert-level full-stack development with 10+ years proven delivery across TypeScript, React, Node.js, and databases
Direct AWS and Kubernetes infrastructure experience; current role includes AI infrastructure and MCP framework development
Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, testing, and clean architecture demonstrated consistently across roles
concerns: Staff Engineer level significantly overqualified for junior/mid-level role; rapid skill ceiling creates retention risk
Location ambiguity—Berlin address but all recent employment in Kenya; unclear relocation feasibility for required high on-site presence
Recent focus on AI infrastructure and tooling rather than customer-facing product feature development in energy/construction domain
